node.title: Is honest prep still enough for top tech interviews

article.title: Is honest prep still enough for top tech interviews
article.content:
# Need honest advice
## Feeling worried about interviews

One of my friends recently got into Amazon and another into Uber. He told me he cleared interviews by cheating using some setup and help from friends already in top companies. He also said it is almost impossible now to clear all rounds honestly.

I am preparing alone with Leetcode and Striver SDE Sheet. I dont have such a friend circle and this made me worried about my prep.

### My questions
- Is it still possible to crack good companies honestly
- Is Striver Sheet + Leetcode enough
- What should someone without inside help focus on

Need guidance from people who cleared interviews on their own.

post.content:
One of my friends got into amazon and another into uber................... and then you are saying I don't have a friend circle.

Everyone's journey is different, stop making excuses and do what you gotta do which is prep honestly. 
There's no such thing as inside help. There are many who are able clear interviews without "Help". 

If you can't then please just leave the industry, it's not for everyone.
